calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-27-2018 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Notice Of Appeal Of Order, Decision, Or Award Of The Labor Commissioner
Off Calendar Aug-28-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RESPONDENT AUGMEDIX INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION'S MOTION TO DISMISS NOTICE OF APPEAL OF ORDER, DECISION, OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT AUGMEDIX INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION'S MOTION TO DISMISS NOTICE OF APPEAL OF ORDER, DECISION, OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER is off calendar. Dismissal filed August 6, 2018.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Notice Of Appeal Of Order, Decision, Or Award Of The Labor Commissioner
Off Calendar Aug-07-2018 Continued To Aug-28-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Dexter Duarte, Tel. No. 1-415-307-8993, Appellant appearing in pro per;
Atty. Mia S. Blackler of the Buchalter Law Firm, Tel. No. 1-415-227-0900
appearing for the Respondent.

RULING - Defendant and appellee Augmedix Inc.'s motion to dismiss appeal of a decision of the Labor Commissioner is continued to August 28, 2018 in order to allow Mr. Duarte an opportunity to file his Opposition to the motion. Opposition papers to be filed by August 13, 2018. Reply papers to be filed by August 20, 2018. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600
